The final move in this game is **\boxed{h8g7}**, a checkmate by the white king (h1) being trapped on h8 with the black queen (f7) and rook (f8) controlling the escape squares.

The game ends with white's king in checkmate, and the last move (?) must be the black queen's capture of the white rook on g7 to deliver the checkmate.
